name: Lamb (Rolled & Stuffed)
recipeIngredient: 1 clove garlic, peeled and cut into thin slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Open the lamb shoulder and spread it flat, skin side down. Make small slits in the meat and insert garlic slices.
2. In a large bowl, combine breadcrumbs, bacon, orange rind, egg, basil, and parsley. Spread the stuffing over the lamb.
3. Roll the meat up tightly, tucking in any loose ends. Secure with string or toothpicks.
4. Place the rolled lamb on a rack in a roasting pan.
5. Roast in a 325°F (165°C) oven for about 1 hour, or until the meat is just pink.
6. During the last 15 minutes of cooking, brush the lamb with orange juice mixed with honey.
